meta.description: User-facing strings keyed by error code, so all three apps say the same thing when the same thing goes wrong. Two layers: `taxonomy` is the app-side typed error taxonomy every platform models; `backendCodes` maps the contract's error.code strings onto a taxonomy key. The app maps a backend code to a typed error, then renders the taxonomy copy. Recovery is an enum the UI turns into a button.

NetworkUnavailable.title: No connection
NetworkUnavailable.message: You appear to be offline. Check your connection and try again.

Timeout.title: Taking too long
Timeout.message: The server did not answer in time. It may still be working.

Unauthorized.title: Signed out
Unauthorized.message: Your session has ended. Sign in again to continue.

Forbidden.title: Not allowed
Forbidden.message: You do not have access to this.

RateLimited.title: Slow down
RateLimited.message: Too many requests. Wait a moment before trying again.

Conflict.title: No longer available
Conflict.message: That is gone or has changed. Refresh and pick again.

Validation.title: Check your details
Validation.message: Some of what you entered was not accepted.

ServerError.title: Something broke
ServerError.message: The server had a problem. This is not your fault.

MalformedResponse.title: Unexpected response
MalformedResponse.message: We received something we could not read and stopped to be safe.

PaymentDeclined.title: Payment declined
PaymentDeclined.message: Your payment was declined. Try a different method.

PaymentUnknown.title: Confirming payment
PaymentUnknown.message: We are checking with the payment provider. Do not pay again.
